meta.title: Let’s teach them how to teach
meta.sourceDoc: 74. P3 - Let’s teach them how to teach 教他们如何教学.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Let’s teach them how to teach 教他们如何教学

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：D
PDF 定位："When poor teachers are fired, new ones are needed-and they will have come through the same educational system that failedtomakefineteachersoftheirpredecessors."（第3段）
PDF 解析：解雇差老师后，补充的新人和被辞退者"受的教育一样"，仍可能教不 好学生，因此不是治本之策。

题目 28
答案：A
PDF 定位：..few newly qualified teachers are well enough prepared for theclassroom."（第4段开头）
PDF 解析：作者直接指出"很少有新教师真正做好课堂准备"，对应选项A。

题目 29
答案：B
PDF 定位：..they become better teachers in their first few years as they get to grips with real pupils in real classrooms, but after that improvementstailoff."（第5段）
PDF 解析：进步原因是"面对真实学生、直面现实"，选项B"havetoengage withtherealitiesofthejob"与之吻合。

题目 30
答案：C
PDF 定位："...asking questions in the classroomwith cold calling'rather than relying on the same eager pupils putting up their hands." (第6段)
PDF 解析：作者暗示"只回答举手学生"效率低，故把C（依靠举手回答）列为 leasteffective。

题目 31
答案：D
PDF 定位："The best head teachers hold novices'hands ... arranging for more-experienced teachers to cover for them when they need timeforfurtherstudyandpractice."（第8段)
PDF 解析："牵着新手的手"本质上就是workingcloselywiththem，选项D。

PDF 定位："The best head teachers hold novices'hands ... arranging for more-experienced teachers to cover for them when they need timeforfurtherstudyandpractice."（第8段)

questionSections.text:
题目 32
答案：YES
PDF 定位："Education has a history of lurching from one miracle'solution to the next.The best ofthem even achieve some good." (第3段)
PDF 解析：说明"诸多神奇方案中，少数确实有效"，与题干一致。

题目 33
答案：NO
PDF 定位："...almost always involves superficialand seemingly useless discussions of theory. Some of these courses... have no effect on how well their graduates'pupils end up being taught." (第4段)
PDF 解析：作者认为单纯理论讨论"无用"，与"理论是必不可少"相反。

题目 34
答案：NO
PDF 定位："Courses that produce teachers who go on to do little to improve their pupils' learning should not receive subsidies... (第7段)
PDF 解析：作者主张停补贴，而不是"给经费改进"。

题目 35
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 解析：文中只说"钱没想的那么重要"（第9段），并未声称"教育经费不足 导致问题"，故信息缺失。

题目 36
答案：YES
PDF 定位：..ensuring the best teachers stay in the classroom will, in most places,meanpayingmore."（第9段）
PDF 解析：明确指出应提高薪酬以留住优秀教师。

questionSections.text:
题目 37
答案：D
PDF 定位："The aim is tomake ordinary teachers great, just as sports coaches help athletes of all abilities improve their personal best." (第2段)
PDF 解析：与D"ateacherwho isnotoutstanding canbe improved"对应。

题目 38
答案：A
PDF 定位："Like other complex skills, teaching requires a route to mastery that is not based on abstruse theory but on intense, guided practice..."（第6段)
PDF 解析：强调"实践比理论重要"，匹配A。

题目 39
答案：F
PDF 定位："A century ago,medical schools raised the calibre of doctors by introducing systematic curriculums and providing clinical experience. It is essential thatteacher-training colleges start tocollectandpublishdata..."（第7段）
PDF 解析：医学界的做法=改课程+临床实践→教师培训应仿效，"更好大纲+ 更多实践"，选F。

题目 40
答案：C
PDF 定位："Improving the quality of the average teacher would raise the profession's prestige, setting up a virtuous cycle in which more talentedgraduatesclamouredtojoin."（结尾段）
PDF 解析：地位提升→吸引更有才华的毕业生，选C。
